title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 - 19 - 2017: 57.0 mi 5:36:53 7,500ft. Happy Bday Kirsten

enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a grueling 57-mile, 7,500-foot cycling day in Boulder, covering a broken MP3 player mid-climb, squeaky brakes fixed at Full Cycle bike shop, running out of water on the Magnolia climb, and coming home exhausted and foggy. He talks through his post-ride eating, his sleep philosophy for training days, mentions he plans to quit weed when his supply runs out, and closes with a birthday shout-out to his girlfriend Kirsten.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: sleep as long as your body needs — don't force an early wake-up if you're still depleted
eat whatever sounds good and tastes delicious; can't just load carbs because the whole body is in shock
plans to quit when current supply runs out because it kills motivation to do necessary tasks
